body.title: Normalize igor_wild_0001 to Igor-wild-0001 EVERYWHERE incl PG DB
body.result: DONE. igor_wild_0001 eliminated everywhere: 197 repo files, 12 ~/.claude/skills, 5 ~/bin scripts, 4 ~/dev/src skills, ~/.ssh/config+authorized_keys, ~/.config/konsolesshconfig, .env, machines.json, PG database renamed, stale ~/.TheIgors/igor_wild_0001/ deleted. Zero remaining hits in repo. D318 recorded.
body.description: Every reference to igor_wild_0001 anywhere — filesystem paths, IGOR_INSTANCE_ID, PG database name, Cortex instance_id, seed scripts, shell scripts (linux+windows), docs, .dsb, tests, Dockerfile, docker-compose — changed to Igor-wild-0001. PG DB renamed. Delete stale ~/.TheIgors/igor_wild_0001/. 12+ prior partial fixes failed because scope was too narrow.
